diagrams.title: RISC vs CISC Comparison Table
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing key differences between RISC and CISC architectures
diagrams.purpose: Understand fundamental differences and why RISC is simpler and faster

diagrams.title: 5-Stage RISC Pipeline
diagrams.description: Pipeline diagram showing overlapping execution of multiple instructions
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how RISC achieves instruction-level parallelism and throughput

diagrams.title: Load-Store Architecture
diagrams.description: Block diagram showing CPU with register file and memory, illustrating how only load/store instructions access memory
diagrams.purpose: Understand why arithmetic operations cannot directly access memory in RISC

diagrams.title: Fixed Length Instruction Format
diagrams.description: 32-bit instruction format showing fields for opcode, source registers, destination register, immediate value
diagrams.purpose: Understand how fixed format simplifies instruction decoding and pipeline design
